# SDK-style Project Conversion Progress

## Overview

This scenario now covers the remaining legacy non-SDK-style projects in `CSharpBible.slnx` after `AddPageWPF` was completed earlier and excluded from the remaining work. The plan converts `CSV_Viewer`, `CSV_ViewerTest`, and `CSharpBibleTest` individually, then finishes with focused validation because the overall solution baseline already fails outside this scope.

**Progress**: 0/4 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%
